name: libgetopt-long-descriptive-perl
title: libgetopt-long-descriptive-perl
summary: module that handles command-line arguments with usage text
description:
module that handles command-line arguments with usage text
Getopt::Long::Descriptive is a convenience wrapper for Getopt::Long, which
allows one to easily define options in the same familiar way, while also
supporting custom descriptions for program usage output.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgetopt-long-descriptive-perl because module that handles command-line arguments with usage text.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgetopt-long-descriptive-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgetopt-long-descriptive-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgetopt-long-descriptive-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
